chunks.text: March IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar March IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, March 10th, 2026. Various IRIS Windows and Linux serve

h 10th, 2026. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday. PRINT, WINTERM, and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, March 11th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am

3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs, (for access to the network and roster databases) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cr

tched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and themis may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Thursday, March 12th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30a

is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30am (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). Linux login servers login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will also be patched and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2026-03-13 | larsrohr ] Resolved

his time. UPDATE [2026-03-13 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2026-03-13 3:45pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusd
to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
